lesson.menu_desc: Join a call, share your screen, and fix sound problems -- I can't hear you / Can you...? -- 27 slides
lesson.subtitle: Aula 15 -- On a Video Call -- Joining, Sharing & Sound
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Percival JR | Aula 15 -- On a Video Call

listenings.text: Hi everyone, this is Daniel, your host for today's video call. Before we start, please do two quick things. First, log in with your full name, so I can see who is here. Second, turn on your camera if you can, but keep your microphone on mute until you want to speak. If you cannot hear me well, send me a quick chat message and I will check the sound. When it is your turn to present, I will ask you to share your screen. If your screen freezes, do not worry, just leave and join again. We will start in two minutes. Thank you, and welcome.

Hi Percival, this is Karen. I am sorry about the call this morning. My internet was slow, so my camera and microphone were not working well. I think you could see my video, but you could not hear me, because there was a strange echo on my side. I tried to share my screen, but it froze, so I had to log in again. Next time, please send me the link a little earlier, and I will join from a quiet room with a clean background. Talk to you soon, and thank you for your patience.

extra_audio.text: First, Percival clicks the link and joins the video call. Then, the host asks everyone to log in with their full name. After that, Percival turns on his camera but keeps his microphone on mute. Later, when it is his turn, he shares his screen to show the report. Finally, his screen freezes, so he leaves and joins the call again.
